# World Conformance Suite

Runtime and source controls for Receiz World and Public Twin contracts across public routes, disclosure/provenance, promotion gates, and canonical pipeline guarantees.

The header row follows the official [Powered by Receiz](https://receiz.com/powered-by) badge contract: provenance first, then live conformance. The suite badge above always reflects the current Receiz surface, while the tables and coverage notes below are pinned to the imported snapshot set `2026-03-28`.

## Full Requirement Coverage

### `W-*`

World public-surface, public twin runtime, provenance, policy, promotion, and publisher-session guardrails.

<details>
<summary><code>W-001</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 1 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.world.public_surface.world_endpoints` | `source` | `pass` | Public surface inventory publishes world snapshot, profile, stream, and public message routes. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-002</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.world.public.route_contract` | `source` | `pass` | Public world snapshot route uses no-store JSON and surfaces the schema-missing guard. |
| `runtime.world.public.snapshot_route` | `runtime` | `pass` | Public world snapshot route returns no-store JSON when the snapshot is resolved. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-003</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 4 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.world.profile.route_limits_and_errors` | `source` | `pass` | Public profile route enforces IP and visitor rate limits with stable error envelopes. |
| `source.world.profile.route_actions` | `source` | `pass` | Public profile route multiplexes welcome, message, and booking actions through explicit handlers. |
| `runtime.world.profile.post.invalid_payload` | `runtime` | `pass` | Public profile POST rejects malformed JSON bodies with a stable invalid-payload envelope. |
| `runtime.world.profile.post.visitor_key_required` | `runtime` | `pass` | Public profile POST requires a visitor key before welcome generation is allowed. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-004</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 4 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.world.stream.sse_contract` | `source` | `pass` | Public twin stream route emits reply lifecycle events over no-store SSE transport. |
| `source.world.stream.rate_limits` | `source` | `pass` | Public twin stream route enforces IP and visitor rate limits before opening the stream. |
| `runtime.world.stream.invalid_payload` | `runtime` | `pass` | Public twin stream POST rejects malformed JSON before opening the SSE channel. |
| `runtime.world.stream.sse_contract` | `runtime` | `pass` | Public twin stream opens an SSE channel with reply-start and terminal event semantics for valid streaming requests. |

</details>

## Evidence Anchors

- [world.conformance.json](snapshots/2026-03-28/world.conformance.json) contains the full imported report payload.
- `requirements[]` maps standards-level requirement IDs to check IDs.
- `checks[]` contains the source and runtime assertions and their human-readable descriptions.
- `revision` identifies the current conformance revision and the number of hashed source files in scope.
- `evidence.sourceDigests[]` in the snapshot lists the referenced live source file digests.
- `history` contains the signed snapshot metadata, badge route, and history route for this suite.
